subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto him who hath turned his face towards the Countenance, that he may attain unto that which hath been sent down in the Book of God, the Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن توجه الی الوجه الی ان فاز بما نزل فی کتاب الله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @prayer for forgiveness, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
